core_mission.stated: Peach is a modern loan management and servicing platform empowering lenders to launch and scale new lending programs with a fully integrated, configurable system of record with API-first architecture.
core_mission.observed: B2B SaaS fintech infrastructure provider focused on enabling rapid product launches while maintaining compliance and operational efficiency in regulated lending environments.

module_a_company_dna.problem_space: Lenders face operational complexity in launching new lending programs, managing servicing workflows, collections, and compliance requirements. Peach solves this by providing a configurable, API-first platform that reduces time-to-market while ensuring regulatory compliance.

business_model.revenue_streams: B2B SaaS subscription model for loan management and servicing platform
business_model.growth_stage: Rapidly scaling with mission to reach $100M ARR in next few years
business_model.financial_health: Growth-stage company with active hiring and expansion

key_responsibilities: Translate operational workflows and lender pain points into feature requirements
Lead cross-functional teams (engineering, data, operations, legal/compliance)
Design, build, and ship features with regulatory compliance
Instrument lending servicing features for performance measurement
Act as internal evangelist for new capabilities
Stay ahead of emerging AI capabilities and vendor landscape
required_qualifications: 5+ years Product Management experience in fintech, credit, lending, payments, or regulated domains
Track record leading cross-functional teams in regulated environments
Strong analytical skills (SQL fluency, experimentation, metrics definition)
Excellent written and verbal communication across technical and business audiences
Comfort balancing strategic vendor partnerships with hands-on development
Obsession for operational detail, scalability, and compliance
nice_to_have: Understanding of lending servicing or collections workflows
Experience building or launching AI-powered products (Agentic AI, NLP, chat/voice automation, compliance tools)
hidden_success_signals: Cross-functional leadership in complex compliance scenarios
